name: Jiandaoyun No-Code MCP
description: Jiandaoyun private no-code platform tools exposed through MCP, with OpenClaw-oriented install helpers, schema cache, one-step northwest-company business tools, presets, discovery, field mapping, records, and workflow todos.

JIANDAOYUN_API_KEY.description: Jiandaoyun API key. Do not store real secrets in the package.

JIANDAOYUN_USER_MAP_FILE.description: Optional JSON file mapping upstream requester SenderId/open_id or unique WeACT identity fields to Jiandaoyun usernames.

JIANDAOYUN_USER_MAP_JSON.description: Optional JSON object mapping upstream requester SenderId/open_id or unique WeACT identity fields to Jiandaoyun usernames.

JIANDAOYUN_MEMBER_MAP_FILE.description: Optional JSON file mapping natural-language member names to Jiandaoyun usernames for user/usergroup fields.

JIANDAOYUN_MEMBER_MAP_JSON.description: Optional JSON object mapping natural-language member names to Jiandaoyun usernames for user/usergroup fields.

JIANDAOYUN_ROOT_DEPT_NO.description: Root Jiandaoyun department number used when resolving user/usergroup field names from the contact list.

JIANDAOYUN_REQUIRED_FIELDS_FILE.description: Optional JSON file mapping app/form keys to business-required field label arrays.

JIANDAOYUN_REQUIRED_FIELDS_JSON.description: Optional JSON object mapping app/form keys to business-required field label arrays.

JIANDAOYUN_CREATOR_POLICY.description: Submitter policy. caller keeps backward-compatible explicit data_creator behavior; locked requires requester SenderId/open_id or WeACT identity mapping and rejects fallback creators.

JIANDAOYUN_WEACT_IDENTITY_LOOKUP.description: When locked-mode direct mapping is missing, auto calls weact-cli to resolve requester identity. Set off to disable.

JIANDAOYUN_WEACT_CLI_BIN.description: WeACT CLI executable used for contact +get-user identity lookup.

JIANDAOYUN_WEACT_CLI_AUTH.description: Identity mode passed to weact-cli contact +get-user, usually bot for OpenClaw servers.

JIANDAOYUN_WEACT_IDENTITY_MAP_FIELDS.description: Comma-separated WeACT identity fields accepted as keys in the user map, for example employee_no,email,enterprise_email.

JIANDAOYUN_WEACT_CONTACT_MATCH_FIELDS.description: Comma-separated WeACT identity fields used for automatic Jiandaoyun contact matching when direct user-map lookup is missing. Defaults include email, employee numbers, and display names.

JIANDAOYUN_WEACT_CREATOR_FIELD.description: Optional trusted WeACT identity field to use directly as Jiandaoyun data_creator. Do not set to name unless names are unique Jiandaoyun usernames.

JIANDAOYUN_DEFAULT_DATA_CREATOR.description: Optional fallback Jiandaoyun username for data_creator when no requester identity is supplied. Ignored when JIANDAOYUN_CREATOR_POLICY=locked.
